channel.title: Delta V IntelHub — All Signals
channel.description: Curated intelligence feed from Delta V

item.title: ✍️ TL;DR: Fed leaves rates unchanged as expected, markets see sharp selloff anyways 📊 Metrics used: Social Trends 🔗 Link to chart: https://app.santiment.net/s/yV-Mbwzx?utm_source=x&utm_medium=post&utm
item.description:

item.title: 🥳 The announcement of an agreement between the U.S. and Iran instantly changed the market narrative from fear to opportunity. After months of traders worrying about supply shocks, inflation, and broad
item.description: <p>🥳 The announcement of an agreement between the U.S. and Iran instantly changed the market narrative from fear to opportunity. After months of traders worrying about supply shocks, inflation, and broader geopolitical instability, investors suddenly had a reason to price in the opposite scenario: r

item.title: 🚀 XRP has staged an impressive comeback, surging +13% in just 24 hours and reclaiming the $1.28 level for the first time in two weeks. Like most altcoins today, $XRP traders have reacted positively to
item.description: <p>🚀 XRP has staged an impressive comeback, surging +13% in just 24 hours and reclaiming the $1.28 level for the first time in two weeks. Like most altcoins today, <a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23XRP">$XRP</a> traders have reacted positively to reports that the US-Iran conflict

item.description: <p>🦄 Uniswap shocked traders with a +24% surge and massive whale activity and volume Tuesday. We explore the Standard Chartered $100 UNI forecast, tokenization’s role in DeFi, and the on-chain metrics fueling the rally that’s still ongoing! 👇<br /><a href="https://app.santiment.net/insights/read/dee

item.title: RT by @StepFun_ai: 最近拿 StepFun 的 Step 3.7 Flash 跑了一次完整的自动编程流水线，从需求文档到能用的工具，65 分钟，中间没碰键盘。先说模型。Step 3.7 Flash 的定位是把 Agent 工作流从头跑到尾：规划、写代码、跑测试、审代码、出错重试，看的是整条流程跑完的综合效率。原生多模态，开源可部署。Agent 循环一次要调几百次模型，快和便宜在这
item.description: <p>最近拿 StepFun 的 Step 3.7 Flash 跑了一次完整的自动编程流水线，从需求文档到能用的工具，65 分钟，中间没碰键盘。<br /><br />先说模型。Step 3.7 Flash 的定位是把 Agent 工作流从头跑到尾：规划、写代码、跑测试、审代码、出错重试，看的是整条流程跑完的综合效率。原生多模态，开源可部署。Agent 循环一次要调几百次模型，快和便宜在这里不是锦上添花，是能不能跑得起的问题。<br /><br />再说项目。hero-coding 是我用 Go 写的一个自动编程流水线：输入一份 Markdown 需求文档，四个 Agent 执行——Plann

item.title: Great to see Step 3.7 Flash live on @FireworksAI_HQ.Designed for inference from day one, Step 3.7 Flash combines a hardware-friendly architecture with MTP-assisted decoding to reach up to 400 tokens/s
item.description: <p>Great to see Step 3.7 Flash live on <a href="https://nitter.net/FireworksAI_HQ" title="Fireworks AI">@FireworksAI_HQ</a>.<br /><br />Designed for inference from day one, Step 3.7 Flash combines a hardware-friendly architecture with MTP-assisted decoding to reach up to 400 tokens/s.<br /><br />Fas

item.title: Thanks @ArtificialAnlys for the detailed independent evaluation.Step 3.7 Flash is built with a clear focus on the intelligence-speed frontier: MTP-assisted decoding, 400+ output tokens/s, stronger age
item.description: <p>Thanks <a href="https://nitter.net/ArtificialAnlys" title="Artificial Analysis">@ArtificialAnlys</a> for the detailed independent evaluation.<br /><br />Step 3.7 Flash is built with a clear focus on the intelligence-speed frontier: MTP-assisted decoding, 400+ output tokens/s, stronger agentic per

item.title: Deploy Step 3.7 Flash on @modal with SGLang 🚀Modal is a serverless AI platform for deploying and scaling compute-intensive workloads without managing infrastructure.Their new guide shows how to serve
item.description: <p>Deploy Step 3.7 Flash on <a href="https://nitter.net/modal" title="Modal">@modal</a> with SGLang 🚀<br /><br />Modal is a serverless AI platform for deploying and scaling compute-intensive workloads without managing infrastructure.<br /><br />Their new guide shows how to serve our open-weight Step

item.title: Great demo by @atomic_chat_hq.Step 3.7 Flash was designed for real-world agentic coding tasks — not just generating code fast, but keeping logic, visuals, and execution coherent across complex outputs
item.description: <p>Great demo by <a href="https://nitter.net/atomic_chat_hq" title="atomic.chat">@atomic_chat_hq</a>.<br /><br />Step 3.7 Flash was designed for real-world agentic coding tasks — not just generating code fast, but keeping logic, visuals, and execution coherent across complex outputs.<br /><br />Love

item.title: Open weights are moving from model cards into real coding workflows.Step 3.7 Flash is designed for fast agentic coding, reliable tool calling, and multimodal understanding.Big thanks for the blog from
item.description: <p>Open weights are moving from model cards into real coding workflows.<br /><br />Step 3.7 Flash is designed for fast agentic coding, reliable tool calling, and multimodal understanding.<br /><br />Big thanks for the blog from the <a href="https://nitter.net/kilocode" title="Kilo">@kilocode</a> tea

item.title: Step 3.7 Flash is now FREE in @kilocode 🎉It was built for how coding agents actually work. That means multi-step orchestration and reliable tool use across a real codebase, not just fast replies.Try i
item.description: <p>Step 3.7 Flash is now FREE in <a href="https://nitter.net/kilocode" title="Kilo">@kilocode</a> 🎉<br /><br />It was built for how coding agents actually work. That means multi-step orchestration and reliable tool use across a real codebase, not just fast replies.<br /><br />Try it on a real task i

item.title: R to @StepFun_ai: Hugging Face link: http://huggingface.co/spaces/stepfun-ai/Step-3.7-Flash-dev

item.title: Step 3.7 Flash is now live on @DeepInfra 🚀Builders and teams can now try our open-source multimodal reasoning model through DeepInfra’s API, with private endpoint deployment available for dedicated wo
item.description: <p>Step 3.7 Flash is now live on <a href="https://nitter.net/DeepInfra" title="DeepInfra">@DeepInfra</a> 🚀<br /><br />Builders and teams can now try our open-source multimodal reasoning model through DeepInfra’s API, with private endpoint deployment available for dedicated workloads.<br /><br />Buil

item.title: RT by @StepFun_ai: i built a production research agent on step-3.7-flash by @StepFun_ai 20 lines of python. direct api call. no orchestration layer. here's what happened.the first thing in terminal:Th
item.description: <p>i built a production research agent on step-3.7-flash by <a href="https://nitter.net/StepFun_ai" title="StepFun">@StepFun_ai</a> <br /><br />20 lines of python. direct api call. no orchestration layer. here's what happened.<br /><br />the first thing in terminal:<br /><br />Thinking...<br /><br /

item.title: RT by @StepFun_ai: most people stream music in a browser tab buried behind thirty others.eating RAM. serving ads between songs.i wanted to see what happens when you strip music down to pure keyboard c
item.description: <p>most people stream music in a browser tab buried behind thirty others.<br /><br />eating RAM. serving ads between songs.<br /><br />i wanted to see what happens when you strip music down to pure keyboard control.<br /><br />so i used Hermes + Step 3.7 Flash to build a spotify-style music player d

item.title: Great to see Step 3.7 Flash available on @ZenMuxAI!Fast, multimodal, and built for real-world workflows — now free to try on ZenMux for 1 month. Excited to make StepFun models more accessible to build
item.description: <p>Great to see Step 3.7 Flash available on <a href="https://nitter.net/ZenMuxAI" title="ZenMux">@ZenMuxAI</a>!<br />Fast, multimodal, and built for real-world workflows — now free to try on ZenMux for 1 month. <br />Excited to make StepFun models more accessible to builders.</p><hr /><blockquote><b

item.title: RT by @StepFun_ai: 发现一个很离谱的模型，400 TPS 的输出速度，比 DeepSeek-V4 Flash 快 2 倍多还有超强的多模态理解 + 搜索检索 + 推理综合，这居然是一个 Flash 模型能同时做到的我让它帮我写了一个竞品分析 Agent：输入一张产品官网截图，自动完成"读图提取 → 搜索市场数据 → 输出竞争分析"的全流程。然后用 Cursor 的定价页试了一下，
item.description: <p>发现一个很离谱的模型，400 TPS 的输出速度，比 DeepSeek-V4 Flash 快 2 倍多<br /><br />还有超强的多模态理解 + 搜索检索 + 推理综合，这居然是一个 Flash 模型能同时做到的<br /><br />我让它帮我写了一个竞品分析 Agent：<br />输入一张产品官网截图，自动完成"读图提取 → 搜索市场数据 → 输出竞争分析"的全流程。<br /><br />然后用 Cursor 的定价页试了一下，不到一分钟跑完，花了一毛多：<br />它先读懂了整个页面（四档定价 × 各档功能差异 × 推荐标签与社会证明），提取出完整的结构化数据。<br /

item.title: Excited to see Step 3.7 Flash live via @novita_labs on @OpenRouter.Built for high-efficiency agent workloads, Step 3.7 Flash combines native multimodal understanding, strong agentic coding capabilitie
item.description: <p>Excited to see Step 3.7 Flash live via <a href="https://nitter.net/novita_labs" title="Novita AI">@novita_labs</a> on <a href="https://nitter.net/OpenRouter" title="OpenRouter">@OpenRouter</a>.<br /><br />Built for high-efficiency agent workloads, Step 3.7 Flash combines native multimodal underst

item.title:
Get your whole company, team, or organization setup on a single managed billing Nous Portal account to power your Hermes Agent today.
300+ models to choose from, premium backend for every core tool i
item.description:
Get your whole company, team, or organization setup on a single managed billing Nous Portal account to power your Hermes Agent today.
300+ models to choose from, premium backend for every core tool in Hermes Agent, all under one account.
Nous Research (@NousResearch)
Nous Portal now has Teams: s

item.title: RT by @Teknium: Put together a vid on how/why I'm using Hermes agentMy networking setup is very overkill for most people, I mostly did it because I'm paranoid (and tbh it was fun)But it's really usefu
item.description: <p>Put together a vid on how/why I'm using Hermes agent<br /><br />My networking setup is very overkill for most people, I mostly did it because I'm paranoid (and tbh it was fun)<br /><br />But it's really useful, highly recommend setting one up it's a great piece of software</p><a href="https://nit

item.title: Time to build your business with Hermes Agent.Two weeks to get your submissions in, 100% online, huge prizes.Learn more about the Hermes Agent Accelerated Business hackathon below - presented by NVIDI
item.description: <p>Time to build your business with Hermes Agent.<br /><br />Two weeks to get your submissions in, 100% online, huge prizes.<br /><br />Learn more about the Hermes Agent Accelerated Business hackathon below - presented by NVIDIA, Stripe, and Nous Research</p><img src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2F
